name: action_entity_register
briefDescription: Register an action extracted from a concept spec .

name: action_entity_triggering_syncs
briefDescription: Return all syncs whose when clause matches this action .

name: action_entity_invoking_syncs
briefDescription: Return all syncs whose then clause invokes this action .

name: action_entity_implementations
briefDescription:
Return implementation symbols ( handler functions ) for 
 this action across ...

name: action_entity_interface_exposures
briefDescription:
Return all interface exposures for this action 
 REST endpoints , CLI command...
